scoring_note: No validated overall pCAT total score is calculated. The -2 to +2 display code is descriptive only.
updated_mapping_detail: The 2026 article main text and Supplementary Table S3 were used. Item 10 retains a primary Materials & Equipment mapping and a secondary Funding mapping.
